description_long: This is a red aluminum can of Coca-Cola, featuring the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on a dynamic red background with white and yellow swooshes. The can is cylindrical with a slightly domed top and bottom, and is adorned with realistic water droplets to evoke a sense of cold refreshment. Nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode are printed on the back in white text, along with the word 'Coke' and a volume indication of 33 cl. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The overall design is sleek and glossy, with the brand's signature color palette and visual motifs. The can is typical of those found in vending machines, convenience stores, and urban environments.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white script logo, water droplets, and detailed nutritional labeling. The can is sleek, metallic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo on a red background with white and yellow swooshes and water droplets.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information, ingredients, barcode, and the word 'Coke' in white text.
description_view_2: Another side view with more nutritional labeling, barcode, and partial logo visible, emphasizing the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the swooshes, water droplets, and partial Coca-Cola logo.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white script on the front and partially on the sides of the can, set against a red background with white and yellow swooshes.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can's red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode are visible on the back and side of the can in white text.
